payload.title: Merge project layer into workspace
payload.description:
Today the data model has 4 layers: Hub → Workspace → Project → Ticket.

In practice every workspace has exactly one project (Scope→SCP, One→RT, Runtime→RT, RangerCRM→RCRM). The project layer is dead weight that complicates every UI: picker on the iOS app, picker on the web board, --project flag on every CLI command.

Goal: collapse Project into Workspace so the model becomes Hub → Workspace → Ticket. The workspace owns the key prefix (SCP), the name, the description, and the overview. Tickets reference workspace_id directly.

Scope of work:
- Schema migration: add key/name/description/overview to workspaces, migrate first (only) project's data, drop tickets.project_id → workspace_id, deprecate projects table
- Hub API: /api/projects → returns workspace data for back-compat, /api/tickets queries by workspace, new ticket creation uses workspace.key
- Web UI: remove project picker, board header shows workspace key + name
- CLI: `scope project` deprecated (alias to workspace), `scope ticket create` no longer needs --project, ticket IDs still look like SCP-N
- iOS app: drop project picker entirely, workspace IS the board
- MCP server: tools that took project_id now take workspace_id (with alias for back-compat)
- Migration script for existing .scope DBs in the wild

Backward compatibility: tickets keep their IDs (SCP-80 stays SCP-80). Old CLI calls with --project should still work via deprecation aliases for at least one minor version.
